title: Comparing Your Real Options for Selling Plugins Without a Payment Processor — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: Are you a creator in Nigeria, Ghana, Pakistan, or another country where PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip have blocked you from selling digital products? You're not alone. Many of your peers face the same restrictions, and it's time for a better solution. Unchained Commerce has developed the Core Shop Engine to fill the gap and let you sell plugins without a payment processor. This post will guide you through the main options, their pros and cons, and help you make an informed decision.
What Each Option Actually Offers

Let's start with the options: PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, Payhip, and NOWPayments. Each has its own set of features and functionality, but they all have one thing in common - they exclude certain countries from using their services. PayPal, for example, restricts access to its services in countries like Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan due to 'regulatory requirements'. Stripe has similar restrictions, and Gumroad blocks users in countries that don't meet its 'anti-money laundering' standards. Payhip, on the other hand, doesn't have any country restrictions, but its fees are high, and it requires a PayPal account to receive payments. NOWPayments, a crypto-native payment processor, is the only option that doesn't require a payment processor account and works everywhere, including restricted countries.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

Now, let's talk about how each option handles restricted countries. PayPal and Stripe have strict policies and requirements for countries like Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan. They often require additional information, such as tax IDs or business licenses, which can be difficult to obtain. Gumroad's restrictions are less clear, and it's often unclear why a country is blocked. Payhip, while not blocking any countries outright, has high fees and requires a PayPal account to receive payments. NOWPayments, on the other hand, has no country restrictions and works seamlessly with the Core Shop Engine, making it the perfect solution for creators in restricted countries.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, fees, and real costs, each option has its own set of charges. PayPal and Stripe charge high fees for international transactions, and their payment processing times can be slow. Gumroad's fees are high, and it requires a PayPal account to receive payments. Payhip's fees are even higher, and it requires a PayPal account to receive payments. NOWPayments, on the other hand, has fast payment processing times, low fees, and no requirements for a payment processor account, making it the most cost-effective option.
PayPal and Stripe exclude certain countries from using their services due to regulatory requirements.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation and delivery capabilities are also a crucial aspect of selling digital products. PayPal and Stripe require manual intervention for payment verification and delivery, which can be time-consuming and prone to errors. Gumroad's automation features are limited, and Payhip's delivery capabilities are slow. NOWPayments, with its integration with the Core Shop Engine, offers fast and automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts, making it the perfect solution for creators who want to sell digital products quickly and efficiently.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

So, which option is right for you? If you're in a restricted country and want to sell digital products, NOWPayments is the clear winner. Its fast payment processing times, low fees, and seamless integration with the Core Shop Engine make it the perfect solution. If you're in a country where PayPal or Stripe are available, you may want to consider using those options. However, if you want to avoid the hassle of KYC requirements and high fees, NOWPayments is the way to go.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country? You can use NOWPayments, a crypto-native payment processor that works everywhere, including restricted countries. With NOWPayments, you can sell digital products quickly and efficiently without the hassle of KYC requirements and high fees. Simply integrate NOWPayments with the Core Shop Engine, and you're ready to go.
Gumroad blocks users in countries that don't meet its anti-money laundering standards.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for a PayPal alternative for creators in restricted countries, you're not alone. Many creators face the same restrictions, and it's time for a better solution. Your Action Checklist

To get started with selling digital products without a payment processor account, follow these steps: Create a Core Shop Engine account and integrate it with NOWPayments. Set up your payment options and configure your delivery settings. Create a product and add it to your store. Promote your store and start selling. Use the NOWPayments wallet to receive payments and track your sales. Monitor your analytics to optimize your sales strategy.
NOWPayments is the only option that doesn't require a payment processor account and works everywhere, including restricted countries.
